snippets.title: Variable Declaration
snippets.code: var variableName: Type = value
snippets.description: Declare a mutable variable with explicit type

snippets.title: Constant Declaration
snippets.code: let constantName: Type = value

snippets.title: Type Inference
snippets.code:
let name = "Alice"  // Inferred as String
let age = 25        // Inferred as Int
let height = 5.9    // Inferred as Double
snippets.description: Let Swift infer types from initial values

snippets.title: String Interpolation
snippets.code:
let name = "Alice"
let greeting = "Hello, \(name)!"

snippets.title: Multiline String
snippets.code:
let poem = """
    Roses are red,
    Violets are blue,
    Swift is awesome,
    And so are you!
    """
snippets.description: Create multi-line strings with triple quotes

snippets.title: Common String Methods
snippets.code:
let text = "  Hello, Swift!  "
text.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces)
text.lowercased()
text.uppercased()
text.hasPrefix("Hello")
text.hasSuffix("Swift!")

snippets.title: Array Creation
Array Access
snippets.code:
let fruits = ["Apple", "Banana", "Orange"]
fruits[0]           // "Apple"
fruits.first        // Optional("Apple")
fruits.last         // Optional("Orange")
fruits.count        // 3

snippets.title: Dictionary Creation
snippets.code:
var scores = ["Alice": 100, "Bob": 95]
let emptyDict: [String: Int] = [:]
var ages: [String: Int] = [:]

snippets.title: Set Operations
If Statement
Switch Statement
snippets.code:
let grade = "A"
switch grade {
case "A": print("Excellent!")
case "B": print("Good")
case "C": print("Okay")
default: print("Try harder")
}
